detailed_execution_specification: This dataset already exists as a clean rectangular monthly time series. The execution engine will honour the execution_order entries and enabled flags declared in the JSON specification, so the implementation order is fixed and no transformation is inferred or skipped silently. Preprocessing shall convert the Date column to datetime using the parameters supplied by the JSON contract and then sort the rows chronologically by Date. The schema shall remain unchanged except for Date becoming datetime, and the completed dataset shall contain 288 observations, two columns, chronological ordering and a datetime Date column compatible with merge.py.
